semantic.role: CLI command router for repository-level operations in the ArchSpine system.
responsibilities: Defines the interface for repository command execution options (ExecuteRepoCommandOptions).
Routes the 'repo' subcommand to appropriate strategy functions: 'check', 'strategy', or 'help'.
Validates subcommand arguments and provides usage guidance via throwCliUsage.
Coordinates repository artifact strategy parsing and execution via parseArtifactStrategy.
outOfScope: Implementing repository analysis or strategy logic (delegated to repo/strategy.js).
Directly managing file I/O or pipeline execution.
invariants: Must remain a thin command router, delegating core logic to services/engines.
Must not contain business logic for repository scanning, analysis, or artifact generation.

changeIntent.architecturalIntent: Separate CLI command routing from core business logic to maintain testability and reusability.
changeIntent.recentChangeIntent: No recent changes to this file's core responsibilities detected from the provided git intent.
